chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D428of 2017: Junaid Ahmed Khokhar Vs. P.O Sindh & others For the Petitioner: Mr. Ali Azhar Tunio, advocate For the Respondents: Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General Sindh Date of hearing: 08.03.2022 Date of announcement: 08.03.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner claims entitled for employment as police constable, however, such appointment was denied thereto on account of the petitioner screening positivefor Hepatitis. The petitioner seeks to controvert the findings of the designated medical facility in such regard and places reliance upon reports privately obtained. Prima facie this is a factual controversy, which cannot be determined without detailed inquiry / evidence. It is apparent that no vested right has been demonstrated before us to merit invocation of the discretionary writ jurisdiction of this Court and even otherwise this matter is fraught with factual controversy, not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. In view hereof, this petition is found to be without merit and is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Per Ijaz Ul Ahsan J. in Syed Iqbal Hussain Shah Gillani vs. PBC & Others reported as 2021 SCMR 425; Muhammad Fiaz Khan vs. Ajmer Khan & Another reported as 2010 SCMR 105. 2016 CLC 1; 2015 PLC 45; 2015 CLD 257; 2011 SCMR 1990; 2001 SCMR 574; PLD 2001 Supreme Court 415.
